narrative:
Circleville City has 8,228 registered voters, with 58.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.3 percentage points.
